narration: P values determine if results are statistically significant, but the story doesn’t end there.

narration: A p value below 0.05 often gets all the attention, but it’s not a magic threshold.
visual_description: Escalation visual: A p value below 0.05 often gets all the attention, but it’s not a magic threshold.

narration: It can’t tell us how important or relevant a finding is—only if it’s unlikely to occur by chance.

narration: So, when you hear p values, remember: context matters, and results can always vary.
